top_stories.title: BSP hikes policy rate anew by 25bps to 4.75%
top_stories.summary: MANILA, Philippines – The Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) raised its benchmark interest rate by a quarter point to 4.75 percent on Thursday, extending its monetary tightening cycle as the inflation outlook continued to deteriorate. top_stories.title: PSEi slips on rate hike fears
top_stories.summary: MANILA, Philippines – Local stocks closed lower Friday after the Bangko Sentral ng PIlipinas raised its inflation forecasts, fueling concerns that interest rates may stay elevated longer. top_stories.title: BSP sets rules on digital transaction fees
top_stories.summary: Banks and other financial institutions will have to justify fees on electronic fund transfers as the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) set new pricing rules for digital payments, following the lifting of the moratorium on fee increases for InstaPay and PESONet transactions.

top_stories.title: ‘More BSP rate hikes possible’
top_stories.summary: The Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) may still deliver more rate hikes this year after raising borrowing costs for a second straight meeting, although economists are divided on whether the central bank will keep tightening or pause as soon as oil prices ease and growth weakens.

secondary_signals.summary: The local stock market ended the week in the negative territory following the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP)’s latest rate hike.

secondary_signals.summary: The Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) has extended the maximum repayment period for salary-based consumption loans to seven years, a move meant to make amortizations more manageable for borrowers while keeping safeguards against excessive debt.

secondary_signals.title: Singapore to offer gold storage services to foreign central banks
secondary_signals.summary: Singapore will allow foreign central banks and sovereign entities to store their gold reserves in the country from October as the city-state seeks to strengthen its position as a regional center for gold trading and storage.
